articles.title: Sebi introduces a simpler NISM certification for research services
articles.description: India's market regulator Sebi has introduced a simplified certification for employees in non-core research roles, aiming to ease business operations. Staff involved in sales and client interaction will now take a lighter NISM module, while those directly preparing research reports remain under the existing stringent examination. This reform reduces compliance burdens for client-facing roles, fostering greater participation in research-related activities.

topStories.description: Iran said Wednesday it was ready for a long war of attrition that would "destroy" the world economy, after firing on two commercial ships and threatening any vessels from the US or its allies.

topStories.title: Supreme Court judge distinguishes between active and passive euthanasia
topStories.description: The judge characterised active euthanasia as causing death by introducing a new, external agency of harm, such as a lethal injection. Conversely, he explained that passive euthanasia should be understood as allowing death to occur.

topStories.title: Bowen: Trump has called for an Iran uprising but the lessons from Iraq in 1991 loom large
topStories.description: The US president might learn that starting wars is much easier than ending them, writes the BBC's international editor.

topStories.title: When it comes to us, the most common word used by Speaker is ‘No’, says Opposition
topStories.description: Rashtriya Janata Dal member Abhay Kumar Sinha said the Speaker’s office had strayed from the neutrality envisioned by the framers of the Constitution.

topStories.title: Opposition blames PM Modi’s foreign policy for fuel crisis in rural India
topStories.description: CPI(M)’s V. Sivadasan says the PM being a friend of U.S. President Donald Trump has not solved the crisis. AAP leader Sanjay Singh asks where the Prime Minister is hiding when country is standing in queue

topStories.title: Wipro Bags Multi-Year Deal From US-Based Retirement Service Firm TruStage To Transform Ops
topStories.description: The financial details of the deal were not disclosed.

topStories.title: 'Even under missiles we carry on living' - how young Iranians are coping with war
topStories.description: Iranians say they are sheltering at home and rarely venturing out on near-empty streets as the US-Israeli bombing campaign continues.

dailyNews.title: Parliament likely to take up Bill to codify IPS deputation in CAPFs this session
dailyNews.description: The Bill intends to codify the functioning of the Central Armed Police Forces (CAPFs) and is in response to a May 2025 Supreme Court ruling that asked the Ministry of Home Affairs (MHA) to “progressively reduce” the deputation of IPS officers

dailyNews.title: US Warns Iran's Civilian Ports In Straight Of Hormuz Could Be Targeted
dailyNews.description: US said Iran's civilian ports in the Strait of Hormuz could become legitimate military targets if used for military operations, as Washington steps up strikes and maritime tensions intensify.

dailyNews.title: Speaker forced to act according to government wishes: Opposition in Lok Sabha
dailyNews.description: Congress MP K.C. Venugopal says the Speaker had repeatedly barred Leader of Opposition Rahul Gandhi from speaking in the House; Parliamentary Affairs Minister says he has never witnessed such misbehaviour from MPs in front of a Speaker

dailyNews.title: Iran Set To Withdraw From FIFA World Cup, Sports Minister Gives Big Statement
dailyNews.description: The current round of conflict between Israel and the United States on one side and Iran on the other started on February 28.

dailyNews.title: G7 welcomes potential record release of oil reserves in bid to curb soaring prices
dailyNews.description: The group of nations welcomes the idea of releasing oil in response to the surge in prices since the US-Israel war with Iran began

dailyNews.title: Spain permanently pulls ambassador from Israel amid Iran war
dailyNews.description: Spain announced on Tuesday it was permanently recalling its ambassador to Israel over its opposition to U.S.-Israeli strikes against Iran.

dailyNews.title: Transfer photos from your phone to a hard drive
dailyNews.description: Learn how to transfer photos from your phone to a hard drive and avoid paying for additional cloud storage while keeping full access to your images.

dailyNews.title: Reporter's Notebook: Trump's SAVE Act ultimatum runs into Senate reality
dailyNews.description: Trump demands Senate Republicans pass SAVE America Act requiring proof of citizenship to vote, but GOP leaders say they lack votes for filibuster.

dailyNews.title: Colts sign Daniel Jones to record-breaking contract as he recovers from Achilles injury: reports
dailyNews.description: Colts reportedly sign Daniel Jones to a two-year, $88 million contract worth up to $100 million, making it the largest two-year deal in NFL history.

dailyNews.title: Former scandal-plagued Illinois 'super mayor' eyes political comeback as a Republican in Georgia
dailyNews.description: Scandal-plagued former Illinois Mayor Tiffany Henyard switches parties, runs as Republican in Georgia after alleged corruption probe and FBI subpoenas.

dailyNews.title: Brooke Slusser sparks liberal social media meltdown by speaking about SJSU transgender volleyball scandal
dailyNews.description: Sports culture war escalates as activists defend volleyball player amid transgender teammate controversy, highlighting ongoing LGBTQ rights tensions.

dailyNews.title: Maxx Crosby's agent disputes medical concerns after Ravens back out of deal with Raiders
dailyNews.description: Maxx Crosby's agent fired back after the Ravens' trade collapse, claiming he's "ahead of schedule" in his recovery despite a reported failed physical examination.

dailyNews.title: House GOP leader launches Senate bid as Trump taps Markwayne Mullin for DHS
dailyNews.description: GOP Rep. Kevin Hern launches his Oklahoma Senate bid to replace DHS nominee Markwayne Mullin, vowing to be a "loyal ally" to President Trump’s "America First" agenda.

dailyNews.title: Washington parents demand action, answers after teacher allegedly raped student on school grounds
dailyNews.description: A Skykomish K-12 physical education teacher and athletic director has been arrested on suspicion of sexually abusing a student for more than a year.

dailyNews.title: Teen charged in senior prank gone wrong makes vow after teacher’s death
dailyNews.description: The Georgia teen charged in his teacher’s death says he feels deepest sorrow and vows to honor his mentor after a senior prank ended in a fatal accident.

dailyNews.title: New York governor warned to fix race-based college program or be taken to court
dailyNews.description: New York faces potential lawsuit over college program allegedly discriminating against White and Asian students in science and technology fields.

topStories.title: Trump ally Clay Fuller advances in Georgia fight for MTG’s former seat
topStories.description: Georgia 14th Congressional District runoff features Republican Clay Fuller, backed by Trump, facing Democrat Shawn Harris April 7 after Harris led with 37% and Fuller earned 35%.

topStories.title: U.S. at Fault in Strike on School in Iran, Preliminary Inquiry Says
topStories.description: Outdated targeting data may have resulted in a mistaken missile strike, according to the ongoing military investigation, which undercuts President Trump’s assertion that Iran could be to blame.

topStories.title: How Trump and His Advisers Miscalculated Iran’s Response to War
topStories.description: In the lead-up to the U.S.-Israeli attack, President Trump downplayed the risks to the energy markets as a short-term concern that should not overshadow the mission to decapitate the Iranian regime.

topStories.title: How Trump’s War With Iran Changed the World in a Week
topStories.description: The conflict is reshaping travel patterns, energy dependencies, living costs, trade routes and diplomatic alliances.

topStories.title: Thune Is in a Vise as Trump and the Far Right Demand a Fight on SAVE America Act
topStories.description: The majority leader is getting pounded for not pushing hard enough, but he says the votes just aren’t there to circumvent the filibuster.

topStories.title: U.S. Seeks Extradition of Maduro Ally Alex Saab From Venezuela
topStories.description: The indicted tycoon Alex Saab is being detained in Venezuela on a U.S. request. His case tests President Trump’s sway over the country’s new rulers.

topStories.title: 17 Democratic States Sue Over Trump Demand Colleges Provide Race Data
topStories.description: The Trump administration wants colleges and universities to share information about the race and gender of applicants to make sure they’re not using racial preferences in admissions.

topStories.title: Trump Documents Missing in Epstein Files Highlight DOJ’s Missteps
topStories.description: In late July, an F.B.I. agent asked colleagues to get started on a sensitive task relating to Jeffrey Epstein, listing the names of 14 prominent men, with President Trump at the top.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration to Announce New Trade Investigations
dailyNews.description: The investigations into unfair trade practices will likely lead to tariffs on foreign countries, as the administration works to replace the import taxes struck down by the Supreme Court.

dailyNews.title: Trump Is the Anti-Trump
dailyNews.description: There is an alternate universe in which the president is the popular, successful figure of his imagination.

dailyNews.title: Trump vows to end war "soon" as Iran hits ships and threatens banks
dailyNews.description: President Trump says he'll end the war soon, when he wants to, as Iran hits three ships near the Strait of Hormuz and warns U.S.-linked banks will be next.

dailyNews.title: Trump says most of Iran's navy is gone
dailyNews.description: President Trump stopped to speak with reporters on Wednesday as he headed to Kentucky, where he touted the U.S. military's operation against Iran, claiming that most of Tehran's navy is "gone."

dailyNews.title: Iran war: Trump says he's not worried about domestic terror attack
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump said oil companies should send tankers through the Strait of Hormuz, which has remained effectively closed due to the war on Iran.

dailyNews.title: Tim Scott hopes Fed Chair Powell investigation 'goes away' to clear Kevin Warsh confirmation
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump nominated Kevin Warsh to succeed Jerome Powell as Fed chair, but the process has been blocked amid a federal investigation into Powell.

dailyNews.title: Who is Markwayne Mullin? Trump ally will bring conservative immigration policies to DHS
dailyNews.description: Republicans are optimistic about Markwayne Mullin taking over the reins at DHS, while Democrats warn his tenure will be more of the same after Kristi Noem.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  War will end with Iran's 'unconditional surrender,' WH press secretary Leavitt says
dailyNews.description: Leavitt said a timeline for the end of the military operation in Iran would be left up to President Trump and would only happen when there is an "unconditional surrender" of the Iranian regime.
